title: premna corymbosa var. minor
intro: Premna corymbosa var. minor, also known as Indian lilac or lesser Indian lilac, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which help in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Premna corymbosa var. minor include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Premna corymbosa var. minor is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
